case_title: MARVIN H HUSBAND VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUSBAND, MARVIN H AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
